message:
feat(onboarding): expand wizard to recognize 10+ providers

Expand provider_from_token() and PROVIDER_CHOICES from 3 to 10 popular
providers (anthropic, openai, google, azure, bedrock, groq, openrouter,
mistral, together, vertex). Add common nickname recognition (claude, gpt,
chatgpt, aws, bedrock, vertex, vertexai, together). Fall back to the
provider_metadata registry for any of the 87 canonical IDs or 17 aliases.

Users can now type any provider name (e.g., "deepseek", "cerebras",
"cohere") during onboarding instead of being limited to 3 options.

7 unit tests cover numbered choices, nicknames, canonical IDs, case
insensitivity, metadata fallback, whitespace, and unknown providers.

Closes: bd-2jskn (DISC-014)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
